title: Technical Showpiece Game
genericDescription: Demonstrate a technical specialty; package complexity behind a playable experience; document technical decisions.
specificDescription: Build a game featuring a technical focus such as shaders, procedural animation, AI, networking, physics, tools, performance, data visualization, or unusual input. Include a technical breakdown.
gradingRubric: 30 pts technical achievement; 20 pts gameplay integration; 20 pts stability; 15 pts technical breakdown; 15 pts polish.
